channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GEM: Geometric Entropy Mixing for Optimal LLM Data Curation
item.description: GEM uses geometric entropy mixing on hyperspheres to optimize LLM data curation, improving downstream accuracy by up to 1.2%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Constraint Tax: Measuring Validity-Correctness Tradeoffs in Structured Outputs for Small Language Models
item.description: Small language models exhibit reduced answer accuracy under structured output constraints that improve schema validity, a tradeoff termed "constraint tax.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] AirCast-SR: A Foundation Model for Kilometer-Scale Atmospheric Super-Resolution via Latent Consistency Diffusion
item.description: AirCast-SR, a foundation model using latent consistency diffusion, downscales 28 km weather forecasts to 1 km resolution with global transferability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] SilIF: Silhouette-Augmented Isolation Forest for Unsupervised Transaction Fraud Detection
item.description: SilIF combines Isolation Forest with silhouette-based scoring for fraud detection, showing improvements on some benchmarks but not others.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Neural Bayesian Sequential Routing
item.description: NBSR framework models neural inference as sequential Bayesian evidence accumulation over hierarchical DAGs, enabling uncertainty quantification and adaptive computation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] TSFMAudit: Data Contamination Auditing in Forecasting Time Series Foundation Models
item.description: TSFMAudit detects pretraining data contamination in time series foundation models by measuring adaptation dynamics through fine-tuning probe behavior.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Push-Based Asynchronous Federated Learning: A Bias-Correction Aggregation Approach
item.description: PushCen-ADFL framework uses bias-correction aggregation for asynchronous federated learning, improving accuracy by 6% while reducing communication costs by 80%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Planning Neural Dynamics with Lie Group Embedding through Supervised Projective Manifold Learning
item.description: Neural networks using Lie group embeddings preserve continuous symmetry for robotics, graphics, and control applications.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] When Rule Violations Are Rare: Chimera Training for Logical Anomaly Detection
item.description: Paper proposes neural rule evaluator with chimera training for detecting logical anomalies in images when constraint violations are rare during training.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] ARBITER: Reasoning Trajectory Basins and Majority Vote Failures in Test-Time Sampling
item.description: ARBITER corrects majority vote failures in test-time sampling by modeling reasoning basin interactions using the base model's own outputs and hidden states.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] InfoQuant: Shaping Activation Distributions for Low-Bit LLM Quantization
item.description: InfoQuant improves low-bit LLM quantization by reshaping activations to be quantizer-friendly, preserving 97% of original model accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] GAC: Noise-Aware Adaptive Mixing for Hybrid SFT-RL Post-Training
item.description: GAC adaptively balances supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning based on online noise estimates, improving hybrid post-training performance across benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Max-Window Scale Estimation for Near-Lossless HiF8 W8A8 Quantization-Aware Training
item.description: Research on HiF8 W8A8 quantization-aware training reveals two failure modes—amax saturation and catastrophic forgetting—with solutions achieving near-lossless LLM deployment.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] HRVConformer: Neonatal Hypoxic-Ischemic Encephalopathy Classification from the Heart Rate signals
item.description: HRVConformer combines convolutional and transformer layers to classify neonatal hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy from heart rate signals, achieving 83.23% AUC.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Modeling Dynamic Mixtures of Time-Delay Systems from Streaming Time Series
item.description: Online framework models streaming time series as dynamic mixtures of time-delay systems, using tensor decomposition to track system regime changes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Co-folding model guided by structural proteomics
item.description: AIMS-Fold is a guided-diffusion framework that integrates structural proteomics data to predict protein complex structures for drug design.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Bridging Classification and Reconstruction: Cooperative Time Series Anomaly Detection
item.description: CoAD combines classification and reconstruction paradigms for time series anomaly detection, addressing limitations of existing methods through cooperative design.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Role of Inductive Bias in Time-Series Pretraining: A Case Study in Learning Generalizable Representations for Clinical Time Series
item.description: Research identifies dynamics-centric inductive biases in transformer pretraining as optimal for transferring clinical time-series representations across classification and regression tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Privacy to Generalization: Linear Max-Information Bounds for DP-SGD
item.description: Researchers prove max-information bounds for DP-SGD with linear dataset scaling, yielding new generalization guarantees for private learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Provably Communication-Efficient and Privacy-Preserving Federated Graph Neural Networks
item.description: CE-FedGNN enables privacy-preserving federated learning on distributed graphs using aggregated representations and metric differential privacy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The Bridge-Garden Dilemma in LLM Distillation: Why Mixing Hard and Soft Labels Works
item.description: Mixing hard and soft labels in language model distillation reduces exposure bias and improves student model performance while reducing training costs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Unified Neural Scaling Laws
item.description: Researchers present a unified scaling law that accurately models neural network behavior across multiple simultaneously varying dimensions for diverse architectures and tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Quantized Keys Steal Attention: Bias Correction for KV-Cache Compression in Video Diffusion
item.description: Research identifies Jensen bias in quantized KV-cache attention and proposes a correction achieving near-BF16 video quality with 50% less memory.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Scaling World-Model Reinforcement Learning Through Diffusion Policy Optimization
item.description: Model-Based Diffusion Policy Optimization unifies search and value learning to address scaling limitations in world-model reinforcement learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Two-Parameter Flows for Learning Population Dynamics of Physical Systems
item.description: Researchers propose two-parameter flows to learn probability density dynamics from unlabeled samples without trajectory data, scaling to high dimensions while capturing non-gradient phenomena.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Stateful Inference for Low-Latency Multi-Agent Tool Calling
item.description: Stateful inference with persistent KV cache enables 2-4x faster multi-agent tool calling by skipping redundant prompt reprocessing.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Dynamic Link Prediction with Temporally Enhanced Signed Graph Neural Networks
item.description: Researchers propose a temporal enhancement framework for signed graph neural networks to improve link prediction in networks with evolving cooperative and adversarial relationships.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Classification and detection of multiple UAVs using rational Gaussian wavelet neural networks
item.description: A neural network using rational Gaussian wavelets detects and classifies UAVs from acoustic signals, outperforming traditional methods while maintaining interpretability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Curriculum Learning for Safety Alignment
item.description: Staged-Competence, a curriculum learning framework, improves DPO safety alignment by reducing OOD harmful responses by 16% and jailbreak attacks by 20%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MULTISEISMO: A Multimodal Seismic Dataset and Model for Cross-Modal Seismic Understanding
item.description: Researchers introduce MultiSeismo, a multimodal seismic dataset with 16K+ events, and develop SeisModal, the first domain-specific multimodal model for comprehensive seismic analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-Verified Distillation: Your Language Model Is Secretly Its Own Synthetic Data Pipeline
item.description: Self-Verified Distillation enables language models to improve reasoning on math, science, and coding tasks using only self-generated and self-verified training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Pretraining Data Exposure in Large Language Models: A Survey of Membership Inference, Data Contamination, and Security Implications
item.description: First unified survey of pretraining data exposure in LLMs, covering membership inference and data contamination risks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SPEAR: Code-Augmented Agentic Prompt Optimization
item.description: SPEAR introduces an agentic prompt optimizer with a Python sandbox tool that autonomously optimizes prompts, outperforming existing methods on industrial and benchmark tasks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CroCo: Cross-Lingual Contrastive Preference Tuning on Self-Generations
item.description: CroCo extends contrastive preference tuning to 14 languages using English-trained reward models, improving LLM performance without language-specific preference annotations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Daily Dose: Workflow-Integrated Large Language Model Automation for Clinical Summarization and Trial Identification in Radiation Oncology
item.description: LLM-driven system delivered automated clinical summaries and trial recommendations to radiation oncology physicians, achieving 84% daily usage and high satisfaction scores.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] RICE-PO: Turning Retrieval Interactions into Credit Signals for Reasoning Agents
item.description: RICE-PO improves training of interactive retrieval agents by converting retrieval interactions into credit signals for latent reasoning steps.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] In-Context Optimization for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Gradient-Descent Perspective
item.description: Researchers connect retrieval-augmented generation to in-context gradient descent and develop efficient context-conditioned updates for frozen language models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Why LLMs Hallucinate on Structured Knowledge: A Mechanistic Analysis of Reasoning over Linearized Representations
item.description: LLMs hallucinate on graphs and tables because attention concentrates on structural shortcuts rather than grounding knowledge in feed-forward layers.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cultural Value Alignment Via Latent Activation Steering in Large Language Models
item.description: Activation steering shifts LLMs' latent cultural values via scenario-based probing without retraining, revealing coupled value structures.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Memory Architectures for Multi-Turn Text-to-SQL: A Benchmark and Empirical Study
item.description: Multi-turn Text-to-SQL study finds that stateless approaches collapse by turn 3, while memory architecture complexity produces inconsistent accuracy improvements across models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Annotator Positionality as Signal: Psychometric Weighting for Anti-Autistic Ableism Detection
item.description: Researchers develop community-informed framework revealing LLMs poorly detect anti-autistic ableism, relying on surface-level keyword matching rather than context.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Towards Just-in-Time Adaptive Feedback: Enhancing Student Learning via Knowledge-Grounded LLM
item.description: Domain-specific expert-grounded LLM framework provides just-in-time adaptive feedback, improving student performance 80% in a large university course.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Slide Deck Q&A Quality Assurance App: A Multi-Stage Pipeline for Pedagogical Question Generation
item.description: Four-stage LLM pipeline generates pedagogically coherent questions from lecture slides, processing both text and visual elements for improved instructional quality.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Probing Minimalist Phase Structure in LLMs: What Universal Dependencies Cannot Represent
item.description: LLMs encode formal syntactic abstractions like Minimalist phases beyond what Universal Dependencies can represent, confirmed via wh-movement probing across 13 models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Vectors Are Not Neutral: Sensitive-Information Inference from Exported LLM Representations in Summarization
item.description: Exported LLM vector representations leak sensitive medical information; SurfaceLoRA fine-tuning reduces but cannot fully eliminate privacy risks from exported representations.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Targeted Remasking: Replacing Token Editing with Token-to-Mask Refinement in Discrete Diffusion Language Models
item.description: Research proposes Token-to-Mask remasking, a training-free replacement for Token-to-Token editing that improves discrete diffusion language model performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LURE: Live-Usage Replay Evaluations for Reducing Evaluation Awareness
item.description: LURE uses real deployment interaction replays to make evaluations less distinguishable from real deployment, reducing LLM evaluation awareness.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Conv-to-Bench: Evaluating Language Models Via User-Assistant Dialogues In Code Tasks
item.description: Conv-to-Bench transforms user-assistant code conversations into automated evaluation benchmarks, reducing manual expert curation requirements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Alignment Tuning for Large Language Models: A Data-Centric Lens on Alignment Data Pipelines
item.description: Survey reframes LLM alignment tuning as a data pipeline design problem, decomposing alignment data construction into three stages: response synthesis, preference evaluation, and preference instantiation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MicroSpec: Accelerating Speculative Decoding with Lightweight In-Context Vocabularies
item.description: MicroSpec accelerates speculative decoding by building context-sensitive vocabularies on-the-fly, reducing vocabulary size by 40x and achieving 1.12-1.32x speedup.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Curation and Extraction of Drug-Related Entities from Reddit Platform
item.description: ReDose introduces 6,435 Reddit posts annotated with drug, dose, and effect entities for training and benchmarking models on medical data extraction from social media.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Model Unlearning Objectives Vary for Distinct Language Functions
item.description: Researchers propose specialized unlearning objectives for LLMs, developing distinct methods for removing dangerous knowledge versus reducing toxicity.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Towards Error-Free EHRs: Reasoning-Intensive Consistency Verification Between Clinical Notes and Structured Tables in Electronic Health Records
item.description: Researchers introduce EHR-ReasonCon, a benchmark for verifying consistency between clinical notes and structured tables in Electronic Health Records using LLM-based reasoning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] FAB-Bench: A Framework for Adaptive RAG Benchmarking in Semiconductor Manufacturing
item.description: FAB-Bench benchmarks RAG systems for semiconductor manufacturing, identifying three context-scaling behaviors and attention dilution as the primary performance degradation mechanism.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Elias in the Lighthouse, Again? Diagnosing Low Diversity in LLM Stories
item.description: LLM-generated stories show low diversity, with eleven words appearing in 88% of outputs across models due to alignment training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Verilog-Evolve: Feedback-Driven and Skill-Evolving Verilog Generation
item.description: Verilog-Evolve framework improves LLM-generated Verilog through feedback-driven refinement and skill evolution across simulation, synthesis, and timing analysis.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Conceptual Steganography
item.description: Researchers demonstrate conceptual steganography in language models, embedding hidden messages in reasoning patterns rather than tokens, with proposed defenses.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reliable Extraction of Clinical Follow-Up Instructions: A Hybrid Neural-Symbolic Pipeline
item.description: Hybrid neural-symbolic pipeline outperforms large language models on extracting clinical follow-up instruction pairs from medical notes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Hubness, Not Anisotropy, Drives Cross-Lingual Retrieval Asymmetry in Multilingual Embedding Models
item.description: Hubness drives asymmetric cross-lingual retrieval in multilingual embeddings; CSLS metric reduces reciprocity gaps by 63.5%.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] LATTE: Forecasting Peer Anchored Preference Trajectories for Personalized LLM Generation
item.description: LATTE uses peer-anchored preference forecasting to personalize frozen LLMs, outperforming existing retrieval and latent profile methods.
